content_en: Deep thinking is essential to boost your brain's potential. The Qur' an urges us to use all our senses to understand and believe the truth of our creation and the creation of the earth and the universe. In many verses of the Qur' an, Allah refers to those who use their minds for deep thinking as 'people of understanding or intelligence'. 31 ~[This is] a Book [the Quran] which We have sent down to you, full of blessings that they may ponder over its verses, and that people of understanding may remember) (Quran 38: 29) «Our mother 'A'ishah (~) reported that one night, Prophet Muhammad (* ) woke up to pray and he cried till his tears wet his beard, then he bowed and cried, and prostrated himself and cried, till Bilal came to start the call for thefajr (dawn) prayer and asked him 30 Muslim. 31 Yahya, 2003b. the reason for his tears. Prophet Muhammad (~ ) said, "How could I not cry, when today these verses of Qur' an have been revealed to me: ~Verily! In the creation of the heavens and the earth, and in the alternation of night and day, there are indeed signs for people of understanding. Those who remember Allah [always, and in prayers] standing, sitting, and lying down on their sides, and think deeply about the creation of the heavens and the earth, [saying], 'O Allah! You have not created [all] this without purpose, glory to You! [Exalted be You above all that they associate with You as partners.] Give us salvation from the torment of the Fire) (Quran 3: 190-191)" Then he (~ ) said, "Woe unto him who reads it and does not reflect." »32 There is no special time, place or condition necessary for thought. You can think while walking, cooking, driving, eating, or even lying in your bed. Try to think positively and sincerely to find your way towards Allah and reach the right conclusions. More than anything, do not get swept away by the flow of daily life. The struggle to acquire a good education, earn your living, raise your children ... all these consume a great deal of your time and effort; despite this, do not forget in your rush, the purpose of your creation: 32 A hadith mentioned and authenticated by Albani. ~And I [Allah] created the jinns and humans only so they should worship Me [Alone]) (Quran 51: 56)
content_id: Berpikir mendalam sangat penting untuk meningkatkan potensi otak Anda. Al-Quran mendorong kita untuk menggunakan semua indera kita untuk memahami dan meyakini kebenaran penciptaan kita dan penciptaan bumi dan alam semesta. Dalam banyak ayat Al-Quran, Allah merujuk kepada mereka yang menggunakan akal mereka untuk berpikir mendalam sebagai 'orang-orang yang berakal'. ~[Ini adalah] Kitab [Al-Quran] yang telah Kami turunkan kepadamu penuh dengan berkah supaya mereka memperhatikan ayat-ayatnya dan supaya mendapat pelajaran orang-orang yang mempunyai fikiran.~ (Al-Quran 38: 29) Kontemplasi atas ciptaan Allah — dari bintang-bintang yang jauh hingga sel terkecil dalam tubuh kita — adalah bentuk ibadah dalam Islam. Berpikirlah mendalam tentang tanda-tanda Allah di alam semesta, renungkan makna Al-Quran, dan refleksikan pengalaman hidup Anda. Ini akan memperkuat iman Anda dan juga mempertajam kecerdasan intelektual Anda.
content_ar:
التفكير العميق ضرورة لاستنهاض طاقات دماغك وتوسيع مداركك. يحثّنا القرآن الكريم على توظيف كل حواسنا في إدراك حقيقة خلقنا وخلق الأرض والكون. وفي آيات كثيرة يُشيد القرآن بأهل التفكر والتدبر والتأمل في عجائب خلق الله وآياته الكونية.

والتفكير العميق يختلف عن القلق والاستغراق في الهموم؛ فهو تأمل هادئ منظّم يُعمّق الفهم ويُوسّع آفاق الإدراك ويُقوّي الصلة بالله. ويُثبت علم الأعصاب الحديث أن التأمل المنتظم يُعيد تشكيل الدماغ بنيوياً ويُعزز القدرات الإدراكية والانتباهية على المدى البعيد.

ومن أفضل صور التفكير العميق في الإسلام: التدبر في آيات القرآن الكريم، والتأمل في أسماء الله وصفاته، والتفكر في الخلق وسنن الكون والتاريخ. قال تعالى: ﴿الَّذِينَ يَذْكُرُونَ اللَّهَ قِيَامًا وَقُعُودًا وَعَلَىٰ جُنُوبِهِمْ وَيَتَفَكَّرُونَ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَٰذَا بَاطِلًا﴾ (آل عمران: 191).
